headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 21, 2026**
article:
The Boston Red Sox edged out the Detroit Tigers 8-6 in a closely contested game, with Riley Greene leading the Tigers' offense. Isaac Paredes led the Houston Astros to a 9-2 victory over the Cleveland Guardians with two home runs and two RBIs. The Cincinnati Reds secured a 6-1 win over the Tampa Bay Rays, with Rhett Lowder earning the win and Sal Stewart hitting 2 home runs.

Several players have been affected by injuries, including San Francisco Giants catcher Daniel Susac, who has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow ulnar neuritis. The Houston Astros have also placed Taylor Trammell on the 10-day injured list with a left groin strain. Other teams have made roster moves, including the placement of Sonny Gray on the 15-day injured list by the Boston Red Sox and Raisel Iglesias by the Atlanta Braves.

The Houston Astros made a trade on April 19, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake from the New York Yankees in exchange for right-handed pitcher Wilmy Sanchez. The Los Angeles Dodgers traded RHP Chayce McDermott to the Baltimore Orioles for RHP Axel Perez.

top_news.title: **Tigers Fall to Red Sox in Thrilling 8-6 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox edged out the Detroit Tigers 8-6, securing their win in a closely contested game. Riley Greene led the Tigers' offense with a 2-hit performance, including a crucial double that scored two runs.

top_news.title: **Astros Take Down Guardians 9-2**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros secured a convincing 9-2 victory over the Cleveland Guardians, with Isaac Paredes leading the charge at the plate. Paredes hit two home runs, including a fly ball to left field, and drove in two runs.

top_news.title: **Reds Take Down Rays 6-1**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a 6-1 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, with Rhett Lowder earning the win. Sal Stewart led the Reds' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Fall to Marlins in 3-5 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals suffered a 3-5 loss to the Miami Marlins, with Agustín Ramírez leading the Cardinals' offense with 1 hit, 1 home run, and 1 RBI. Max Meyer pitched 5.1 innings for the Marlins, striking out 8 batters and allowing 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Giants Place C Daniel Susac on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: San Francisco Giants catcher Daniel Susac has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow ulnar neuritis, effective retroactive to April 20, 2026.

top_news.title: **Astros Acquire Shewmake in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros made a move on April 19, 2026, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake from the New York Yankees in exchange for right-handed pitcher Wilmy Sanchez.
